name: 下藥/被迫飲酒
description: Michelle在派對上被下藥，幾乎被陌生男人侵犯。這個情節既是懸疑元素也是情感催化劑，讓Richard再次出手救她。
tags: 意識模糊的視覺呈現＋危險逼近的緊迫感

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Someone drugged you. ... What do you care? ... Stop pushing me away. This is serious. You could have gotten hurt.
examples.context: 意識模糊的視覺呈現＋危險逼近的緊迫感
